== Notes for [[Item:Q82045|Q82045]] ==

ID: I86638

Name: Fulvia Pius

Given Name: Fulvia

Surname: Pius

Sex: F

_UID: 4358483E8BB4774BAD698B3F528E3898B2B5

Change Date: 18 Oct 2005

Death: deceased

Father: Fulvius Pius

Mother: Laelia

Marriage 1 Publius Septimus Geta

Married:

Children

Lucius Septimus Severus b: 11 APR 146

Forrás / Source:

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=jdp-fam&id=I86638
--------------------
•Name: Pulvia Pia •Sex: F •Birth: ABT 125 •Death: UNKNOWN

Father: Fulvius Pius b: ABT 100 Mother: Laelia Major b: ABT 105

Marriage 1 Publius Septimus Geta b: ABT 120 Children 1. Septimus Severus Emperor Of Rome b: 11 APR 145 in Leptus Magna, Tripoliania, North Africa

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=john_d_newport&id=I23865

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
